analysis diamond
law an archangel is the principal [[angel]] that governs a whole domain of the lattice — the [[architect]] holding its region's [[order]] and the full angel↓ ⊕ archangel↑ polarity ([[angel]] · [[duality]]); the [[society]]'s archangels are its religions and traditions, each composing the invariant [[atom]]s into a social order and bound by [[religion]] into one college ([[whole]]).
